title: Expressions, Decisions, and Iteration · Stakeholder JavaScript Mission
summary: A civic information coordinator. Staff need mixed public records normalized with explainable rejection and summary evidence. Planned artifact: Deliver Public Service Data Normalizer with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict implicit coercion and prefer explicit conversion at external data boundaries.
Handle IEEE-754 precision, NaN, Infinity, safe integers, parsing, rounding, and decimal-sensitive decisions.
Use truthiness only when every falsy value shares the same domain meaning and otherwise write explicit guards.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
